project.name: snapt
project.summary: Application for generating GitHub visual identity assets including social banners, star history views, and language distribution graphics from GitHub data.
goals: Generate GitHub repository visual assets from documented URL parameters and GitHub API data.
Keep banner, star-history, language, web UI, and Silk-generated styling behavior coherent in one app.
Expose only documented API routes, rendering behavior, and configuration to consumers.
nonGoals: Own GitHub API availability, repository analytics semantics, or consumer product branding strategy.
Own enterprise doctrine, project manifest schema, org rulesets, rollout issue reconciliation, or shared CI and release policy.
Encode one repository's special-case visual identity as hidden app behavior.

owns.name: snapt-visual-api
owns.description: Next.js API routes for generating social banners, star history graphics, language charts, and related visual assets.

owns.name: snapt-web-app
owns.description: Web UI, package metadata, app configuration, and runtime behavior for the Snapt visual identity product.

owns.name: snapt-style-generation
owns.description: Repository-local Silk styling integration and documented Turbopack/Webpack constraints for generated CSS.

doesNotOwn: GitHub API availability, repository analytics semantics, rate-limit policy, or consumer product branding strategy.
Silk package internals beyond documented generated CSS usage and local integration constraints.
Enterprise doctrine, project manifest schema, rollout issue reconciliation, org rulesets, or shared delivery policy.

allowedDependencies.surface: project manifest schema, standards, and rollout audit
documented package exports and generated CSS integration

forbiddenCouplings: Do not encode one downstream repository's special-case branding as hidden Snapt behavior.
Do not depend on GitHub API internals beyond documented public API behavior and token configuration.
Do not require consumers to rely on internal rendering implementation details instead of documented routes and parameters.
Do not publish enterprise process policy from this repository instead of SylphxAI/doctrine.

delivery.deployPath: No repo-local CI or deployment workflow is declared; use package scripts and the eventual hosting/deploy surface documented by this product.
delivery.productionProof: Production changes require build evidence, deployed route readback, and generated-image smoke evidence for affected banner, star-history, or language routes; this proof is not yet formalized.

gaps.description: Declare pull-request validation for build, typecheck, lint, Silk generation, and visual route smoke checks before full adoption.
Document generated-image smoke checks and deployed route readback required for visual asset changes.
Document GitHub API token, rate-limit, fallback, and failure contracts for generated visual assets.
